title: artemisia campestris var. monticola
intro: Artemisia campestris var. monticola, also known as Mountain Mugwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mountain Mugwort include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
